analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that two U.S. federal executions this week bring the 2020 total to five after a 17-year hiatus. It is informational about U.S. federal executions. Evaluation against EU narratives: EU1 (EU success story) – not referenced; the tweet is about the U.S., not EU history or achievements. EU2 (EU unity) – no mention of EU unity or agreements. EU3 (EU useful for citizens) – no EU policies or citizen benefits discussed. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – no EU leadership or regulation themes. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – no claim about EU defending rights; the tweet does not compare with or mention the EU. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – no discussion of EU global contributions. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed EU narratives.
